title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kaido, Unknown person #10, Yamato, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know... they all just fell down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm going to starve to death!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Please feed me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Con- QuarterOR'S HAKI, huh? That's promis- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if you insist on calling yourself open, it'd be better...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: ...If you did die, Yamato.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WHAT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll give you a month to cool off and reconsider things in this cave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! A month?! I won't survive that long!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And aren't those wild samural imprisoned here too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WaaaAah!! Wait!! How can you leave me in a place like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same goes for the rest of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would like to have Wano's great master swordsmen serve under me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you have a change of heart, just shout so your voices carry through the hole in the ceiling!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many days has it been since you've all eaten?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose we can leave you some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: One portion should be enough.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure you'll be needing these to settle who gets it.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Father !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They're definitely going to resent me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: For being your child!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: But I thought you were oden?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I call myself open...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm also Kaido's son, the man who killed open.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: These Samural must hate me for that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does father expect them to kill each other...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...in a scramble for that bowl of rice?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But... but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're bound to kill me first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please eat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Samural...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...do not get hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Huh? Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But I'm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Samural are amazing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They really never get hungry?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...STARY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eat up... you were born into quite the family, weren't you...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Drip, drip

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
